case_title: CAMPBELL, PATRICIA et al VS SKYLINE REALTY INCORPORATED et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY INCORPORATED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, PATRICIA DEMARCO, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY INCORPORATED SKYLINE REALTY MANAGEMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
